concerts.name: An Evening with Priscilla Presley - Life After Elvis

Hardin, Terry Blackwood, Larry Strickland, Boh Carter, Paul Leim, Donna & Craig Morris, Larry Hall, Mike Brignardello, Kerry Marx, The Holladay Sisters , Bobby Ogdin with Special Guests Jillian Cardarelli ,  Deborah Allen, Thomas Gabriel Hosted by Donna Presley
